metadata.title: Your Version — AI+1 series 3/4
metadata.color_semantics: claude fidelity: INK #3D3929 all text; SPARK #D97757 the one accent; callout ink #161511 on cream. Do not retint.
metadata.greeting_note: Swedish short form (HAI budget) — HAI takes only the shortest forms (Hi · Ola · Hej · Ciao); never spell out HumanitariansAI in the greeting (the footer chip does that). Wagwan n/a (Bear only).
metadata.purpose: CUSTOMER pitch, not investor pitch: sell custom workshops, custom courses, and $1 Kindle books from a nonprofit doing good, and send viewers to the Humanitarians AI YouTube.
metadata.note: COLD OPEN LAW: B00 = ClaudeComposerAsk. SPARK-LINE LAW: every inner beat carries a short serif spark line. HANDOFF LAW: 2nd-to-last beat is the composer with a paste-ready action, greeting 'Your turn.'. OUTRO LAW: restate the title, poster serif, terracotta period. House grammar: >=1 PREDICT beat; verdict page carries the phase gate; decisions.json + DECISIONS.md ship beside this sheet.

beats.narration_text: You can — and it ends with a zip you own the rights to transform. Here's the whole path, from one email to your course.

props.command: can I get a custom version of this course?

beats.narration_text: Step one: email info at humanitarians dot A I. Tell us the course, your audience, and what custom means for you. We quote a price for your version. No subscription, no platform fee — a quote.
What ships: the base videos, the exam banks, and — the part that matters — the rights to transform them. Into your book. Your course. Your workshop. Your brand on it.
It opens in any C L I — Claude Code, Codex, next year's tool. Rewrite the examples for your industry, cut what you don't teach, add what you do. Our content, your judgment.
Before the reveal, one question: what's the one thing we don't sell you? Think about what stays out of the zip — and what was never ours in the first place.

The judgment. We sell the starting point — vetted videos, tested exams — but what to teach, what to cut, what your learners actually need: that was never ours to sell. The zip makes you faster. It does not make you optional.
One page. Email, quote, zip. Videos, exams, and the rights to make them yours — in whatever C L I you already use.

artifactLines: Email info@humanitarians.ai: the course + your audience → a quoted price. No subscription.
The zip: base videos · exam banks · transform rights — your book, your course, your workshop.
Opens in any CLI — rewrite, rebrand, reorder. No platform, no lock-in.
Phase gate: we ship the base · you transform it · your learners get your version.

beats.narration_text: Your turn. Paste this, and send what comes out. The quote costs nothing — and the zip is the fastest course you'll never have to build from scratch.

props.command: Draft the email to info@humanitarians.ai: name the course I want, describe my audience in two sentences, and ask what a custom version costs and exactly what ships in the zip.

beats.narration_text: Your version. Last: straight into Canvas.
